user_123.content: Why am I scrolling so much?

As someone who scrolls quickly but engages selectively, Your attention span is low - you're scrolling quickly without deeply engaging with content. Your behavioral archetype is 'Quick-Scroll Engager' - characterized by fast scrolling with minimal retention. The algorithm keeps you engaged through novelty and dopamine hits, even when content quality is low.

Next steps: Set a time limit for sessions, Slow down and watch each reel fully.
